title: Vaelia
description: An optional modpack to play on the Vaelia SMP made by irovae.
body:
The Vaelia SMP is a private server between friends, and this is an optional client-side modpack to use to get the full experience on our server. The modpack is based as a fork of performance modpack [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop), from which we added quality-of-life mods afterwards.

The Vaelia SMP server uses a modified version of the [Aetherial Islands](https://modrinth.com/datapack/aetherial-islands) datapack for the world generation.

<details>
<summary>Client-side mods:</summary>

- [3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers)
- [BadOptimizations](https://modrinth.com/mod/badoptimizations)
- [BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3)
- [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)
- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)
- [Dynamic Crosshair](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamiccrosshair)
- [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps)
- [Elytra Physics](https://modrinth.com/mod/elytra-physics)
- [Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe)
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)
- [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)

- [Nvidium](https://modrinth.com/mod/nvidium)
- [Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip)
